zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Swynford於1425年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾諾薩爾時，她的父親Thomas Swynford11422歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Beauchamp8歲。她於1438年與Sir Thomas Paunceforte在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾凱特列索普結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1475年在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Swynford于1425年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾諾薩爾时，她的父亲Thomas Swynford11422岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Beauchamp8岁。她于1438年与Sir Thomas Paunceforte在英国英格兰林可爾史爾凱特列索普结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1475年在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Swynford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Gloucestershire, Oxfordshire, Kent): habitational name from Old Swinford (Worcestershire), Kingswinford (Staffordshire), Swinford (Leicestershire), Swinford in Cumnor (Berkshire), or Swinford in Hothfield (Kent), all of which are recorded Swineford or Swyneford in medieval documents. The placenames derive from Old English swīn ‘swine, pig’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Swineford
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from one of the English places that gave rise to   Swinford  .
Americanized form of German Schweinfurt(h), a habitational name from a place so named (Franconia).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Swynford was born in 1425, in Northall, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Thomas Swynford, was 11422 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Beauchamp, was 8. She married Sir Thomas Paunceforte in 1438, in Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1475, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Swynford est née en 1425, à Northall, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Swynford, avait 11422 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Beauchamp, avait 8 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Paunceforte en 1438, à Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1475, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Swynford 1425 in Northall, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Swynford 11422 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Beauchamp 8. Sie hat 1438 in Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Paunceforte geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1475 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Swynford è nata il nel 1425 nel Northall, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Swynford, aveva 11422 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Beauchamp, aveva 8 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Paunceforte nel 1438, nel Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1475, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Swynfordが1425年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアノーサルで生まれた時，父Thomas Swynfordは11422歳，母Lady Elizabeth Beauchampは8歳であった。1438年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアケットレソルペでSir Thomas Paunceforteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1475年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Swynford(이)가 1425년 영국 벅잉함실르 노르솔에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Swynford(은)는 11422세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Beauchamp(은)는 8세였다. 그녀는 1438년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 케틀레소에서 Sir Thomas Paunceforte(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Swynford nasceu em 1425, em Northall, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Swynford, tinha 11422 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Beauchamp, tinha 8 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Paunceforte em 1438, em Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1475, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Swynford родилась в 1425 г. в местности нортолл, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Swynford было 11422 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Beauchamp, 8. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Paunceforte в 1438 г. в местности кеттлетаурп, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1475 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Swynford nació en 1425, en Northall, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Swynford, tenía 11422 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Beauchamp, tenía 8 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Paunceforte en 1438, en Kettlethorpe, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1475, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
